title: Color code Last Updated column based on time that has passed since last update
excerpt: looking to change the color of the last updated column based on the amount of time that has passed for example I want the cell to fill yellow after 1 week has passed from the last update and then turn red when it has bee…

posts.author: IFM.Justin.H (Justin Honaker)
posts.cookedHtml: looking to change the color of the last updated column based on the amount of time that has passed for example I want the cell to fill yellow after 1 week has passed from the last update and then turn red when it has been 1 month since the last update the closest I could find was conditional coloring but it wasn’t that in depth
